name: civilization-wiki
description: Static Civilization Wiki renderer and visualization smoke tests.

scripts.test:js: node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcData.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcNav.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcLayout.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcDraw.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationOntology.js
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test:js && npm run test:unit && npm run test:py && npm run test:dom && npm run test:browser
